    chore: close-out 0.41.1 — init + clone redesign

    0.41.1 ships the init + clone redesign:

    - TARGET / NAME / --scope shape across init + clone
    - Provisioner trichotomy (GhCreate / LocalBareInit /
      ExternalPreExisting)
    - User config schema (~/.config/vc-x1/config.toml,
      account/category/value)
    - options_flags/ leaves + bundles + Pattern-A architecture
      (FlagBundle / OptionBundle / OptionFlagBundle markers)
    - init function shape stabilized at
      pub fn init(args, create_symlink)

    Deferred to follow-on cycles (entries added to todo.md):

    - Symmetric .vc-config.toml schema (was the second half of
      -6's title)
    - test_helpers::Fixture migration + TestFixture* rename
      (was -7)
    - init dual|por arg split (was -6.9; may not happen)

    Cycle shape: ~30 commits on init-clone-refactor across
    top-level steps -0 through -8, with -6.7 keeping its
    9-commit decomposition separate (informative for the OF
    refactor); the close-out is a single commit dropping the
    version suffix.

    Next: rebase main (0.42.0-0..-4.6) onto init-clone-refactor;
    conflict surface in notes/init-clone-refactor-conflict.md.

    - Cargo.toml: 0.41.1-6.8 → 0.41.1
    - notes/todo.md: drain ## In Progress; 8 entries to ## Done;
      3 deferred items added to ## Todo
    - notes/chores-08.md: ### Cycle close-out (0.41.1) section

    ochid: /slvprlpwpyoq

      311: {"parentUuid":"38275497-4ec6-463d-a5ef-8f1f430cd795","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_014Mc3gwU1Lj2CKECFNoq5i2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"","signature":""}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":6,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4660,"cache_read_input_tokens":115852,"output_tokens":3106,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4660,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":3106,"cache_read_input_tokens":115852,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4660,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4660},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CakDDpuirXQes4JWjXVza","type":"assistant","uuid":"cfbb6c91-6359-4413-9fd4-e8ee31c4d780","timestamp":"2026-05-05T22:29:35.438Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/wink/data/prgs/rust/vc-x1","sessionId":"be6b39e0-51cb-4d38-a34b-ed2ad842c923","version":"2.1.128","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
      312: {"parentUuid":"cfbb6c91-6359-4413-9fd4-e8ee31c4d780","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_014Mc3gwU1Lj2CKECFNoq5i2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Symmetric schema is a clean direction — same shape readable from either side, no per-role conditionals.\n\nOne concern with the cwd-basename heuristic: it only works when cwd **is** a role root. If cwd is `<root>/.claude/foo/`, the basename is `foo`, not `.claude`, so the rule says \"you're in code\" when you're actually in bot.\n\nRobust answer: walk up to find the workspace root (the existing `find_workspace_root` already does this via `.vc-config.toml` with `path = \"/\"`), then check which configured path cwd falls under. Basename-match is a fast-path shortcut that works at exactly the role roots; below that you need the walk-up.\n\nBigger framing: this is real design work + implementation, not a close-out tidy-up. I'd suggest:\n\n- **Drop the schema half from `-6`'s title at close-out** — rename it `init refactor` and explicitly note in the chores `-6` close-out that the symmetric-schema half deferred. Honest framing of what shipped.\n- **Slot symmetric schema as its own cycle** — likely `0.41.2` or `0.42.x`. Give it room for the design call (basename heuristic vs walk-up vs both, what the migration path looks like for existing workspaces) rather than squeezing it under a close-out deadline.\n\nThat keeps the merge-now plan clean. Acceptable, or would you rather try to land at least a minimal symmetric schema before close-out?"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":6,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4660,"cache_read_input_tokens":115852,"output_tokens":3106,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4660,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":3106,"cache_read_input_tokens":115852,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4660,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4660},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CakDDpuirXQes4JWjXVza","type":"assistant","uuid":"a59600f1-99a5-4126-aa0a-ebe9029fd251","timestamp":"2026-05-05T22:29:42.000Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/wink/data/prgs/rust/vc-x1","sessionId":"be6b39e0-51cb-4d38-a34b-ed2ad842c923","version":"2.1.128","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
